title: Bostik Flashband Self Adhesive Flashing Tape Grey - 100mm x 10m - For Roofs - Provides an Instant Water tight Seal
features: FLEXIBLE BITUMEN STRIP - Bonds instantly to most building materials to provide a permanent, watertight seal in all climates
EASY TO APPLY – Can be applied using just hand pressure and a seam roller, No special equipment needed
USES - Repairing lead flashing, Sealing valley gutters, Mending leaks in drain pipes and guttering, and much more
BONDS TO MOST MATERIALS - Brick, masonry, slates, metal, terracotta tiles, roofing felt and more
CONTENTS - 1x Bostik Flashband Self Adhesive Flashing Tape for Roofs, Colour: Grey, 100mm x 10m
description: From the manufacturer Bostik Flashband Self Adhesive Flashing Tape for Roofs Bostik Flashband Self Adhesive Flashing Tape for Roofs is a flexible bitumen strip that bonds instantly to most building materials to provide a permanent, watertight seal. Flashband is easily applied using just hand pressure and a seam roller and is ideal for new build, maintenance and repair projects. Suitable uses Roofing: Replace damaged lead flashing, seal upstands and eve pieces, use for roof capping, edge flashing on roofing felt, and to repair roofing felt or joints on flat roofs. Drainage: Use to seal or repair valley gutters, guttering and down pipes. Four layers of protection Flashband has four layers of protection – a lacquer coating, heavy duty aluminium foil, tear resistant polyester membrane, and a polymer enhanced bitumen adhesive – meaning it’s both tear and impact resistant and can withstand extreme temperatures of up to 100°C. Advantages at a glance Bostik Flashband Self adhesive flashing tape for roofs Bonds instantly to most building materials to provide a permanent, watertight seal Easy to apply using hand pressure and a seam roller Ideal for new build, maintenance and repair projects Perfect for roofing and drainage sealing and repair projects 4 layers of protection: Tear and impact resistant, Withstands extreme
